title: load_chats and load_messages_for_chat silently truncate at hardcoded limits
description: client_task.rs load_chats passes limit: Some(200) and load_messages_for_chat passes limit: Some(100) with no pagination loop. Users with more chats or messages than these thresholds see silently truncated results with no error, warning, or indication that data is missing. The maintenance consequence is: users report 'missing chats' or 'missing messages' as data-loss bugs. Reproducing requires a real account at scale. Any contributor copy-pasting these functions for new data types will repeat the pattern.
